subject: league tournament table detection
fact: TablePlay can currently treat a fixed Game.TournamentBuyIn as the signal for a league tournament table because TournamentBuyIn is passed when league season or tournament one-off events launch a game, and no other web/API creation path sets it.
reason: Future UI or review work around tournament-specific behavior on the table page needs to know that league tournaments are currently inferred from TournamentBuyIn rather than explicit league metadata in GetGameResponse.
